title: Dimension Jumper Origin
description: A custom origin made specifically to suit my playstyle.  I have decided to share it with everyone.  Updates will be made in the future.  Feel free to use this as a base for your own origin.
body:
Currently only Works on 1.20 for now.

The Datapack for my personal origin made to suit my play style.  Glass cannon plane hopper.

The Dimension Jumper has a few abilities, but a wide variety of passive abilities.  Meant mainly for exploration, you can: see in the dark, swim forever, walk on lava, and are immune to frostbite.  And not only that, you're completely immune to all status effects.

Dimension Jumper Abilities:

Jump+- (Primary)
You can jump to a different dimension in a forward cycle from your current dimension to the same position in another dimension, Overworld --> Nether --> End and back to the Overworld. This ability recharges after 30 seconds.

Tether+- (Secondary)
Your kind can tether their life force to an area to go back to when they perish. (To use this ability you must crouch) This ability recharges after 5 minutes.

Dimension Strike+
You passively discharge dimensional energy into your strikes to make up for your lack of armor, hitting far harder and far faster than most.

Environmental Immunity+
You're immune to fire, freeze, and lightning, starvation, and one-shot damage.

Slow Falling+
You're naturally lighter, as your dimensional jumping physically demands lighter forms.

Extra Travel Forms+
You can breath underwater and walk on lava. But you take double damage while underwater, and you swim slower in lava.

Warping Body+-
You cannot wear armor, and you're unable to use shields.  However, your attack range and mining distance is vastly increased.

Hated-
Iron Golems will attack you, and Villagers have increased trade price.  On the other hand... Pillagers are your biggest fans!

Sleepless-
You cannot sleep, or use beds.
